{{Quote|I greet you, Cakhmaim clan Eikh'mir.|Leia Organa Solo|<ref name="Specter of the Past" />}}
'''Clan Eikh'mir''' was a [[Noghri/Legends|Noghri]] clan. [[Cakhmaim]] was one of its finest warriors<ref name="TLC Sourcebook">''[[The Last Command Sourcebook]]''</ref> and served as a [[Bodyguard/Legends|bodyguard]] to [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa Solo]] and her family.<ref name="Specter of the Past" />

{{Stub}}
